Upaniklis

System / Location · First seen 3305-11-08 · 17 mentions
Active: 3305-11-08 → 3308-06-17

Forester's Choice

Federal Congress
Mentions Timeline (17 articles)
3308-06-17
A Renewed Journey for the Golconda
The generation ship Golconda departs Upaniklis with sixty percent of its former population resuming their ancestral voyage after Artificers Clan megaship upgrades, with Commander Javi Alvarado invited to join the crew.
3308-06-09
Golconda Receives Vital Supplies
Community deliveries enable the Golconda generation ship to achieve full operational status and resume its millennia-long voyage.
3308-06-02
Relaunching the Golconda
The ancient generation ship Golconda is retrofitted and prepares to resume its voyage with community support.
3308-05-31
The Golconda Resurrection
The Artificers Clan completes repairs on the Golconda, and the former inhabitants debate whether to resume their ancestral voyage.
3308-05-26
Derelict Generation Ship Undergoes Repairs
The Artificers Clan begins retrofitting the Golconda with modern systems, sparking debate among the former population about returning to their nomadic lifestyle.
3308-05-20
Mystery in Upaniklis
The Artificers Clan continues to examine the Golconda in Upaniklis, causing unease among the former inhabitants at Forester's Choice.
3308-05-13
Dredger Clan Visits the Golconda
The Artificers Clan dredger enters the Upaniklis system and begins examining the abandoned generation ship Golconda.
3308-05-12
Supply Rare Goods for Rackham Celebration
Zachary Rackham hosts a week-long trillionaire celebration in Beta Hydri, requesting rare goods from pilots.
3307-04-02
Galactic Mysteries: Generation Ships
Investigators Erik Gunnarson and Francesca Wolfe explore the mysteries of abandoned generation ships, recounting chilling tales of the Thetis, Lazarus, Pleione, Artemis, Demeter, and the Golconda — relics of pre-hyperdrive colonisation efforts.
3305-12-05
Golconda’s Inhabitants Migrate to Forester’s Choice
The crew of the generation ship Golconda migrate to their new home at Forester's Choice outpost in the Upaniklis system. The Federation arranged transportation from the ancient vessel. The colonists will continue distilling Apa Vietii.
3305-11-24
Federation Delivers Golconda’s New Home
The Federation wins the bid to provide the Golconda population with a permanent home at the orbital outpost Forester's Choice. The colonists accept Federal partner status while retaining autonomy.
3305-11-22
A Gift from the Golconda
The Golconda inhabitants offer a case of their traditional spirit Apa Vietii to the Upaniklis system as a token of gratitude. The beverage, distilled for centuries, receives praise from gourmet critic Giles Cappelleo.
3305-11-18
Superpowers Compete over Golconda’s Future
The Empire and Federation launch rival initiatives to provide a new home for the Golconda crew. The ancient vessel can no longer sustain its population. Captain Jonathon Forester insists the population remain together.
3305-11-15
Golconda Attracts Superpower Interest
The Empire and Federation both deploy megaships to Upaniklis with competing proposals for the Golconda crew. The Empire offers a planetary settlement under Imperial protection, while the Federation offers an orbital outpost to preserve their spacefaring traditions.
3305-11-14
Golconda Receives Vital Aid
The initiative to supply the Golconda with essential medicines and materials concludes successfully. The colonists gratefully accept the aid, and early indications suggest the antiviral treatment is halting the "wasting kiss" outbreak.
3305-11-11
The Golconda Generation
Professor Elizabeth Perez studies the Golconda's unique culture, noting their isolationist tendencies, recognisable social structure, and contentment with spacefaring existence. She warns that contact with outsiders could irrevocably damage the society.
3305-11-08
Inhabited Generation Ship Discovered
An inhabited generation ship, the Golconda, is discovered in the Upaniklis system. The ancient vessel's crew suffers from a virus called "the wasting kiss" and requires medical supplies and maintenance materials.
